part.text:
---
## Goal
- Rename const variable declarations across internal/bsr/*.go files (e.g., pubKeySelfSignatureFile → pubKeySelfSignatureFileName)

## Constraints & Preferences
- Apply changes across whole repository
- Ensure project typechecks after refactoring
- Preserve exact identifiers and file paths when known

## Progress
### Done
- Renamed: pubKeySelfSignatureFile → pubKeySelfSignatureFileName
- Renamed: sessionMetaFile → sessionMetaFileName
- Renamed: connectionFile → connectionFileNameTemplate
- Renamed: bsrFile → bsrFileNameTemplate
- Renamed: sigFile → sigFileName
- Updated references in internal/bsr/container.go and internal/bsr/bsr.go

### In Progress
- Renaming remaining constants (wrappedPrivKeyFile, wrappedBsrKeyFile, pubKeyBsrSignatureFile, messagesFile, requestsFile, checksumFile, channelFile, metaFile, bsrPubKeyFile)
- Fixing broken regex artifacts in internal/bsr/bsr.go (e.g., \bmessagesFileNameTemplate\b.*\b\.data")

### Blocked
- None

## Key Decisions
- Added "FileName" suffix for non-template constants (pubKeySelfSignatureFile → pubKeySelfSignatureFileName)
- Used "FileNameTemplate" suffix for template constants (connectionFile → connectionFileNameTemplate)
- Batch replaced all const declarations with targeted literal replacements using specific needles

## Next Steps
1. Complete renaming of remaining constants in internal/bsr/*.go
2. Fix any broken regex artifacts introduced during replacement
3. Run go vet/typecheck to ensure code compiles cleanly
4. Update test files (internal/bsr/bsr_open_test.go, etc.) if const names appear there

## Critical Context
- Some replacements created malformed Go code (e.g., \bpattern\b in declarations)
- Mixed variable names in internal/bsr/bsr.go function signature due to regex issues
- Must carefully distinguish between declaration and usage patterns when renaming

## Relevant Files
- internal/bsr/container.go: Contains sigFile, metaFile, checksumFile, bsrPubKeyFile, wrappedBsrKeyFile, wrappedPrivKeyFile, pubKeyBsrSignatureFile declarations and usages
- internal/bsr/bsr.go: Contains sessionMetaFile, connectionFile, messagesFile, requestsFile, bsrFile, channelFile, metaFile declarations and multiple usages
- internal/bsr/bsr_open_test.go: References SessionMetaFile that needs renaming
- internal/bsr/container.go: Has test file referencing bsrFile format string
